title: Principal Financial (PFG) Q2 Earnings Miss on Higher Expenses
text: Principal Financial's (PFG) second-quarter results are affected by deteriorating performances in most segments coupled with higher expenses.

title: Principal Financial (PFG) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Principal Financial (PFG) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Principal Financial (PFG) Lags Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Principal Financial (PFG) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.53 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.66 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.65 per share a year ago.

title: Principal Financial Group® Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal Financial Group® (Nasdaq: PFG) announced results for second quarter 2023. Non-GAAP net income attributable to PFG excluding income from exited business1 for second quarter 2023 of $324.5 million, compared to $207.7 million for second quarter 2022. Non-GAAP net income excluding income from exited business per diluted share of $1.32 for second quarter 2023. Non-GAAP operating earnings for second quarter 2023 of $375.8 million, compared to $424.0 millio.

title: You can still run with the stock market's bulls, but watch the exits
text: The stock market, as measured by the S&P 500 Index SPX, -0.64% ), has been moving upward. The U.S. benchmark index is essentially crawling up the higher “modified Bollinger Bands” (mBB), which is a bit of an overbought condition, but not a sell signal.

title: Principal Financial (PFG) to Post Q2 Earnings: What to Expect?
text: Principal Financial's (PFG) Q2 earnings are likely to reflect favorable fixed income markets, positive net cash flow, higher premiums and fixed maturity yields, offset by higher operating expenses.

title: Principal® launches Focused Blue Chip ETF
text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal Asset ManagementSM today launched the Focused Blue Chip ETF (BCHP). This ETF will be a large-cap growth portfolio managed by Principal Aligned, the equities investment team with more than 20 years of success managing mid-cap and blue chip strategies for Principal.
